# technitium_admin_permission (Resource)

Manages admin permissions for a section on a Technitium DNS Server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `section` (String) The permission section name.

### Optional

- `group_permissions` (String) Pipe-delimited group permissions: name|canView|canModify|canDelete. Multiple entries separated by pipes.
- `user_permissions` (String) Pipe-delimited user permissions: username|canView|canModify|canDelete. Multiple entries separated by pipes.
